channel.title: Weekly on TzJ's Net
channel.description: Recent content in Weekly on TzJ's Net

item.title: Weekly Summary 2026-W20
item.description: Designed and deployed Unified AI Agent Workflow system across three repositories (gadget, TokenMonitor, LifeCopilot) establishing standardized SPEC→PLAN→IMPLEMENT→VERIFY→REVIEW protocol for cross-agent development. Completed major infrastructure migration moving Miniconda and 4 conda environments from C: to D: drive, freeing ~70 GB. Fixed critical summarize deployment bugs that blocked 72 days of reports from publishing to GitHub Pages.

item.title: Weekly Summary 2026-W18
item.description: Successfully stabilized and released TokenMonitor v0.12.1, resolving 6+ critical Windows platform bugs including hover oscillation feedback loops, tray icon focus issues, window positioning instability, and false positive warnings. Implemented automated Cursor IDE reconnection with token refresh polling, eliminating manual restart requirements. Established robust CI/CD pipeline with comprehensive formatting and linting compliance across multi-platform builds.
